**STATE:** FIX COMPLETE — code merged, awaiting GitHub Actions auto-deploy to S3/CloudFront.

**ROOT_CAUSE:**
1. `#properties-grid` rendered empty (0 height) until JS injected deal cards → main screen jumped vertically when deals loaded.
2. Every modal (`openFunnel`, `openMemberReg`, `openPartnerApply`, `openInvestModal`, `openPortal`, `openLegalModal`) set `document.body.style.overflow='hidden'` without scrollbar-width compensation → horizontal page shift on desktop every time a signup/partner overlay opened or closed.
3. No `scrollbar-gutter` reservation → page shifted when the document scrollbar appeared/disappeared.
4. `.live-deal-gallery` had no `min-height` fallback → cards with failed/missing photos collapsed before the gradient placeholder painted.

**FILES_CHANGED:** `expo/ivxholding-landing/index.html`

**LAYOUT_SHIFT_FIX:**
- Added `scrollbar-gutter: stable both-edges` to `html` (reserves scrollbar lane so appearing/disappearing scrollbar never reflows the page).
- Added reserved `min-height` to `.live-deals-grid` (520px desktop / 760px tablet / 1180px mobile) so the deals section holds its final height before any card renders.
- Injected 3 skeleton placeholder cards (`#properties-skeleton`) into the empty grid — same grid template, same `aspect-ratio: 16/10` image box, animated shimmer. Removed (not collapsed) by `_ivxClearDealSkeleton()` the moment real deals render, then `.is-populated` drops `min-height` to 0.
- Added `contain: layout style` to `.hero` so the hero subtree never reflows its ancestors.
- Added `min-height: 180px` to `.live-deal-gallery` so a failed image never collapses the card.
- Added `lockBodyScroll()` / `releaseBodyScroll()` helpers (depth-counted, idempotent) that set `--ivx-scrollbar-w` to the measured scrollbar width and apply `body.ivx-modal-open { padding-right: var(--ivx-scrollbar-w); overflow: hidden }` — so when the OS scrollbar hides, the page gets an equal right padding and content stays put. Replaced all 6 `document.body.style.overflow='hidden'` sites with these helpers.
- All overlays already use `position: fixed; inset: 0; display: none → flex`, so opening them never touches document flow — no auto-scroll or focus-jump on open.

**HERO_STATUS:** Stabilized — `contain: layout style`, no intrinsic-size jumps.

**DEALS_SLIDER_STATUS:** Stabilized — reserved min-height + skeleton cards removed atomically on real render.

**SIGNUP_MODAL_STATUS:** Stabilized — `lockBodyScroll` compensates scrollbar width; no horizontal shift on open/close.

**ANDROID_STATUS / IOS_STATUS / DESKTOP_STATUS:** Mobile-native viewport meta unchanged; `scrollbar-gutter` is a no-op on mobile (no visible scrollbar) so no regression; desktop scrollbar shift eliminated.

**SIGNUP_STATUS:** Form logic untouched — `openMemberReg`/`closeMemberReg`/`submitMemberReg` still call the same endpoints, only the scroll-lock wrapper changed.

**LIVE_DEALS_STATUS:** No fake/demo members or deal counts added. `STATIC_FALLBACK_DEALS` and the Supabase/API fetch paths are unchanged; only the rendering container is stabilized.

**TESTS_RUN:** `runChecks(expo)` → PASSED (0 errors). HTML structure validator → 0 unclosed tags. Manual grep audit → 1 remaining `document.body.style.overflow` reference (the helper comment, not a call).

**GITHUB_SHA:** Pending Rork sync — will be the commit SHA Rork pushes to main for this change set.

**RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:** N/A — landing is S3+CloudFront, not Render. Backend live commit `d229e4aa` (boot `2026-07-05T22:45:30Z`).

**LIVE_URL:** https://ivxholding.com/ — currently serving pre-fix HTML (last-modified `2026-07-05T19:25:46Z`, 466,660 bytes, 0 matches for new fix markers).

**SCREENSHOTS:** N/A — sandbox has no browser; visual confirmation must happen after the auto-deploy completes on a real device.

**BLOCKERS:**
1. **Deploy not yet live.** The `deploy-landing.yml` GitHub Actions workflow runs only after Rork syncs `expo/ivxholding-landing/**` to `main`. The sandbox lacks `AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID`, `AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY`, `AWS_REGION`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` — the exact secrets the workflow pulls from GitHub repository secrets — so I cannot push to S3/CloudFront directly from here. Once Rork's managed sync pushes the commit, GitHub Actions builds + uploads + invalidates CloudFront automatically.

**FINAL_STATUS:** CODE COMPLETE — layout-shift fixes applied, expo checks green, deploy pending GitHub Actions auto-trigger via Rork code sync. Will be VERIFIED once the live `https://ivxholding.com/` HTML contains `scrollbar-gutter`, `ivx-deal-skel`, and `lockBodyScroll` (re-fetch the URL and `grep -c` for those three markers — should return ≥3).

Next step on your side: after the GitHub Actions `Deploy ivxholding.com landing page` run completes, refresh `https://ivxholding.com/` on desktop + Android + iOS and confirm the hero/deals/signup areas no longer jump. If you want, I can add a CLS assertion script that curls the live HTML and checks for the three fix markers — say the word.
